# Joey Mariano

> Ms. Joey Mariano — Creative Technologist, Artist, and Educator. 26+ years integrating arts and technology across music, visual art, and code. Based in the Philadelphia / Mid-Atlantic region.

## Pages

- [Home](https://joeymariano.com): Site overview and short bio
- [Resume](https://joeymariano.com/resume): Interactive resume with experience, education, and sortable skills. Downloadable PDF export with embedded metadata for ATS and AI agents.
- [Visual Art](https://joeymariano.com/visual-art): Black Book sketch journal (rotating page viewer), pixel art, multimedia installations, design work
- [Music](https://joeymariano.com/music): Recordings and projects from nmlstyl — chiptune, Game Boy and Sega Genesis programming, guitar, and the TwilioQuest soundtrack
- [Code](https://joeymariano.com/code): Tech projects — PICO-8 demos, ESP32 escape-room props, Jekyll sites, live-performance rigs, chiptune-style audio code

## Notable Works

- [Juvenile Amplifier (2009)](https://laboralcentrodearte.org/es/obras-y-proyectos/juvenile-amplifier-2009/): Interactive Game Boy speaker installation. Toured Europe after first exhibiting at Laboral Centro de Arte, Gijón, Spain. Featured in the "Playlist" exhibit on music and obsolete technologies.
- [TwilioQuest Soundtrack](https://www.twilio.com/quest): Composed music for Twilio's open-source learn-to-code game ([GitHub](https://github.com/twilioquest))
- [Airframe Ultra Environment Art](https://store.steampowered.com/app/2522120/Airframe_Ultra/): Licensed Black Book sketch assets to Akupara Games — used as in-game decoration on motorcycle tracks
- [Black Book](https://joeymariano.com/visual-art#black-book): Ongoing rotating sketch journal — Posca paint pen drawings scanned at high resolution
- [nmlstyl](https://nmlstyl.art): Active music project, releases on [Bandcamp](https://nmlstyl.bandcamp.com)

## Recent Roles

- Installation Tech — Knabe Labs / Ministry of Awe (Old City Philadelphia, 2026)
- Tech Assembly & Physical Computing — BRDG Studios / Nike ACG, Nike's House of Innovation NYC (2025)
- Physical Computing + Fabrication — Knabe Labs / Queen Mary Escape Room, Los Angeles (2025)
- Environment Artist — Akupara Games / Airframe Ultra (2025)
- Cofounder — 8static, monthly chip music event in Philadelphia (2008–2017, occasional revival shows)

## Education

- BM, Jazz Guitar Performance — Rutgers University, Mason Gross School of the Arts (1998–2002), student of Vic Juris
- Teacher's Assistant apprenticeship under Wil Lindsay — The Hacktory, Philadelphia (2009–2010). Taught Arduino workshops in the FTDI Cable era.
- Fullstack Web Development — Flatiron School (2017–2018), Women Take Tech Scholarship recipient

## Skills Areas

Physical computing, ESP32, Arduino, soldering, interactive sculpture assembly, escape-room props, AV installation, Q-SYS, networking. Full-stack web development with Ruby on Rails, React.js, JavaScript, Sass, Bootstrap, Squarespace, Jekyll. Music — composition, performance, production, chiptune, Game Boy programming, education. Visual art — Posca paint pens, pixel art, installation, design.

## Contact

- joey@joeymariano.com
- [GitHub](https://github.com/joeymariano)
- [Bandcamp (nmlstyl)](https://nmlstyl.bandcamp.com)

## Site Structure

This site is a Jekyll static site with PostCSS/Tailwind, built and deployed via GitHub Actions. Card-based content lives in `_cards/`, job entries in `_jobs/`, and education in `_data/education.yml`. The resume page exports a styled PDF on demand via jsPDF with embedded Roboto Mono.
